message:
feat(redact): email + hostname redaction, deterministic OpenClaw scan order

src/pages/redact.rs:
- Add Email and Hostname variants to RedactionKind enum with
  corresponding as_str() serialization ("email", "hostname")
- Implement email redaction via lazy EMAIL_RE regex that matches
  RFC 5321-ish addresses; controlled by config.redact_emails flag,
  replaces matches with [EMAIL_REDACTED]
- Implement URL hostname redaction via lazy URL_HOST_RE regex that
  captures scheme, optional userinfo, hostname, and port; preserves
  scheme + userinfo + port while replacing only the hostname with
  [HOST_REDACTED]. Controlled by config.redact_hostnames flag.
- Add 4 tests: email enabled/disabled, hostname in URLs with port,
  hostname preserves non-URL filesystem paths

src/connectors/openclaw.rs:
- Sort session_files() output for deterministic scan order across
  filesystems that return readdir entries in arbitrary order (ext4
  returns hash order, XFS returns inode order)
- Replace bare "as i64" cast on messages.len() with i64::try_from()
  saturating to i64::MAX to prevent wraparound on pathological
  sessions with >2^63 messages
- Add test verifying sorted scan order (z-last before a-first
  without sort → a-first before z-last with sort)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
